mapper.select: select * from exam_paper where creator_id = #{userid} and deleted=0
mapper.insert: insert into exam_course (teacher_id, class_id, paper_id, status, start_time, end_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{courseId}, #{paperId}, 0, #{startTime}, #{endTime})
mapper.select: select u.username,c.course_name,ep.title , e.status, e.start_time, e.end_time from exam_course e inner join user u on e.teacher_id = u.id inner join course c on e.class_id = c.id inner join exam_paper ep on e.paper_id = ep.id where e.teacher_id = #{userid}
